name: goofile
title: goofile

commands.name: goofile
commands.usage: goofile [-h] [-d DOMAIN] [-f FILETYPE] [-k KEY] [-e ENGINE] [-q QUERY]

arguments.description: show this help message and exit
arguments.raw: -h, --help            show this help message and exit

arguments.description: the domain to search - optional (ie. kali.org
arguments.raw: -d, --domain DOMAIN   the domain to search - optional (ie. kali.org

arguments.description: Google Custom Search Engine API key - optional
arguments.raw: -k, --key KEY         Google Custom Search Engine API key - optional

arguments.description: Google Custom Search Engine ID - optional
arguments.raw: -e, --engine ENGINE   Google Custom Search Engine ID - optional

arguments.description: Only search for files with keyword - optional
arguments.raw: -q, --query QUERY     Only search for files with keyword - optional

arguments.description: Set the logging verbosity to something other than
arguments.raw: --logging LOGGING     Set the logging verbosity to something other than

commands.raw_help:
root@kali:~# goofile -d kali.org -f pdf

-------------------------------------
|Goofile v1.5                       |
|Coded by Thomas (G13) Richards     |
|www.g13net.com                     |
|code.google.com/p/goofile          |
-------------------------------------

local_help.--help:
usage: goofile [-h] [-d DOMAIN] [-f FILETYPE] [-k KEY] [-e ENGINE] [-q QUERY]
               [--logging LOGGING]

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
  -d, --domain DOMAIN   the domain to search - optional (ie. kali.org
  -f, --filetype FILETYPE
                        the filetype to search for - required (ie. pdf)
  -k, --key KEY         Google Custom Search Engine API key - optional
  -e, --engine ENGINE   Google Custom Search Engine ID - optional
  -q, --query QUERY     Only search for files with keyword - optional
  --logging LOGGING     Set the logging verbosity to something other than
                        "INFO" - optional
local_help.-h:
usage: goofile [-h] [-d DOMAIN] [-f FILETYPE] [-k KEY] [-e ENGINE] [-q QUERY]
               [--logging LOGGING]

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
  -d, --domain DOMAIN   the domain to search - optional (ie. kali.org
  -f, --filetype FILETYPE
                        the filetype to search for - required (ie. pdf)
  -k, --key KEY         Google Custom Search Engine API key - optional
  -e, --engine ENGINE   Google Custom Search Engine ID - optional
  -q, --query QUERY     Only search for files with keyword - optional
  --logging LOGGING     Set the logging verbosity to something other than
                        "INFO" - optional
local_help.help:
usage: goofile [-h] [-d DOMAIN] [-f FILETYPE] [-k KEY] [-e ENGINE] [-q QUERY]
               [--logging LOGGING]
goofile: error: unrecognized arguments: help

apt_metadata.description:
Command line filetype search
Use this tool to search for a specific file type in a given domain.

use_cases: Use as a candidate tool in the chain planner; review provenance before use.
Indexing only — no automated invocation. The operator must manually inspect the repository before adding to a toolchain.
Use as a candidate tool in the chain planner; review provenance before use.
Use as a candidate tool in the chain planner; review provenance before use.
Use as a candidate tool in the chain planner; review provenance before use.
Pair with the LLM system-prompt stanza to ensure the chain planner knows how to call this tool.
